text.title: Django Services Layer Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the code artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-django-services.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: service_name not entity_action; write_count>1 with atomic=false; kw_only=false; missing tests_path.
